title: Help
failedToLoadLevelEditor: Failed to load Level Editor documentation.

keyboard.heading: Keyboard Controls
keyboard.placeBomb: Place a bomb at your current position
keyboard.throwBomb: Throw a bomb in your facing direction
keyboard.sendEmote: Send a quick emote (GG, Help!, Nice!, Oops, Taunt, Thanks)

gamepad.heading: Gamepad Controls (Xbox / Standard)
gamepad.tip: Any standard-mapped controller works. Just plug in and play.

mechanics.heading: Basic Mechanics
mechanics.bombsDesc: explode after 3 seconds in 4 cardinal directions up to their fire range
mechanics.chainReactionsDesc: bombs caught in an explosion detonate instantly, creating devastating combos
mechanics.kickedBombsDesc: slide until hitting a wall, bomb, or player
mechanics.shieldBreakDesc: after your shield absorbs a hit, you get 10 ticks of invulnerability to escape
mechanics.spawnInvulnDesc: 2 seconds of protection after spawning or respawning
mechanics.gracePeriodDesc: 1.5 seconds after win condition before the game ends; winner is invulnerable

spectator.heading: Spectator Mode
spectator.tip: When you die, you enter spectator mode to watch the remaining players.
spectator.breakFollow: Press any movement key or drag to break follow and return to free camera

powerUps.tip: Dropped when breakable walls are destroyed. Walk over floating tiles to collect. Your HUD (bottom-left) shows your current stats.

powerUpDetails.bomb_up: Increases your maximum bomb count by 1 (caps at 8). Place more bombs simultaneously to trap enemies and create chain reactions.
powerUpDetails.fire_up: Extends your explosion range by 1 tile in each direction (caps at 8). Longer reach means more area denial and easier kills.
powerUpDetails.speed_up: Boosts your movement speed (up to 5 levels). Move faster to dodge explosions, chase enemies, and grab power-ups first.
powerUpDetails.shield: Creates a protective aura that absorbs one explosion hit, then breaks. After breaking, you get brief invulnerability to escape. Does not stack — extra pickups are consumed with no effect. No time limit.
powerUpDetails.kick: Walk into a bomb to kick it sliding across the map. Kicked bombs travel until hitting a wall, another bomb, or a player. Applies a short movement cooldown after kicking.
powerUpDetails.pierce_bomb: Your explosions pass through destructible walls instead of stopping. Walls are still destroyed, but the blast continues beyond them. Devastating for clearing large areas.
powerUpDetails.remote_bomb: Your bombs no longer auto-detonate on a timer. Press E (or B on gamepad) to detonate. Safety auto-detonation after 10 seconds. Bombs appear blue with a blinking effect. Press E with no bombs placed to toggle between ALL (detonate all at once) and FIFO (detonate oldest first) mode. Your current mode is shown in the HUD.
powerUpDetails.line_bomb: Places a line of bombs in your facing direction, using up to your remaining bomb capacity. Great for cutting off escape routes or triggering massive chain reactions.
powerUpDetails.bomb_throw: Press Q (or Y on gamepad) to throw a bomb 3 tiles in your facing direction, flying over walls and obstacles. The bomb lands on the farthest valid tile. Combines with pierce/remote bomb types.

modeDetails.ffa: 2–8 players. Classic elimination — be the last one standing. 3 minute rounds.
modeDetails.teams: 4–8 players split into Team Red and Team Blue. Last team with a surviving member wins. Friendly fire is configurable by the host. 4 minute rounds.
modeDetails.battle_royale: 4–8 players. A circular danger zone shrinks from the edges over time. Standing outside the zone deals damage every tick. Stay inside and outlast everyone. 5 minute rounds.
modeDetails.sudden_death: 2–8 players. Everyone starts fully maxed out (8 bombs, 8 range, max speed, kick). No power-ups spawn. One hit kills — pure skill. 2 minute rounds.
modeDetails.deathmatch: 2–8 players. Respawn 3 seconds after death with reset stats. First to 10 kills wins, or whoever has the most kills when time runs out. 5 minute rounds.
modeDetails.king_of_the_hill: 2–8 players. A glowing 3×3 zone appears on the map. Stand in it to score points. First to 100 points wins. The hill moves every 30 seconds — a ghost outline shows the next position 5 seconds before it shifts. 4 minute rounds.

reinforcedWalls.heading: Reinforced Walls
reinforcedWalls.tip: Optional — toggled when creating a room.
reinforcedWalls.desc: Breakable walls take 2 hits to destroy. The first explosion cracks them (visually damaged), and the second destroys them completely. Plan your bomb placement accordingly.

dynamicEvents.heading: Dynamic Map Events
dynamicEvents.tip: Optional — toggled when creating a room. Adds random chaos to keep matches exciting.
dynamicEvents.meteorStrikesDesc: Random tiles are targeted every 30–45 seconds. A warning reticle appears on the ground for 2 seconds before impact. Meteors destroy walls and kill players in the blast zone.
dynamicEvents.powerUpRainDesc: Every 60 seconds, power-ups drop across random open tiles on the map. A great way to gear up mid-game.
dynamicEvents.wallCollapseDesc: Every 45–60 seconds, a 3×3 area of destructible walls crumbles after a 2-second warning. Opens up the map and can catch you off-guard.
dynamicEvents.freezeWaveDesc: Every 50–70 seconds, a row or column of tiles freezes into ice for 6 seconds. Walking on ice causes you to slide with momentum. A 1-second warning appears before the freeze.
dynamicEvents.bombSurgeDesc: Every 40–55 seconds, all bombs on the map instantly lose 1 second of fuse time, making them detonate earlier than expected. A red screen pulse signals the surge.

hazardTiles.heading: Hazard Tiles
hazardTiles.tip: Optional — toggled when creating a room. Placed in fixed positions on the map.
hazardTiles.teleportersDesc: Glowing pads in blue/orange pairs. Step on one to instantly warp to the other. Use them for surprise attacks or quick escapes.
hazardTiles.conveyorBeltsDesc: Dark tiles with directional arrows. Automatically push you in the arrow direction when you step on them. Can be used strategically or can trap you in danger.

themeVariants.heading: Theme Variants
themeVariants.tip: In campaign mode, each world has its own visual theme. Walls and destructible blocks change appearance to match.

levelEditor.tileRefTip: These are the tiles available in the level editor. Campaign mode tiles include additional special types.
levelEditor.wall: Wall — indestructible, blocks movement and explosions
levelEditor.destructible: Destructible — breakable wall, may drop power-ups when destroyed
levelEditor.destructibleCracked: Cracked — damaged destructible wall, one more hit to destroy (reinforced mode)
levelEditor.teleporter: Teleporters — blue/orange pairs, step on one to warp to the other
levelEditor.conveyor: Conveyors — push players, bombs, and enemies in the arrow direction
levelEditor.exit: Exit — trapdoor texture, conditionally walkable (unlocks after prerequisite kills)
levelEditor.goal: Goal — star marker, walk onto it to complete the level objective
levelEditor.switch: Switch — pressure plate that toggles linked gates (4 colors: red, blue, green, yellow)
levelEditor.gate: Gate — portcullis bars blocking passage, linked to switches by color
levelEditor.crumbling: Crumbling Floor — breaks into a pit 10 ticks after a player or enemy steps off
levelEditor.quicksand: Quicksand — slows movement, kills after 2 seconds (Desert theme)
levelEditor.lava: Lava — instant kill on contact (Volcano theme)
levelEditor.spikes: Spikes — cycling safe/lethal phases, 2s safe then 1s lethal (Castle theme)
levelEditor.darkRift: Dark Rift — teleports to a random empty tile (Void theme)
levelEditor.fullDocsDesc: See the complete campaign system documentation below for details on enemies, bosses, win conditions, and more.
